expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: supporting issues stay context_only_no_defect_analysis and produce summaries
expectations.evidence: In result.md under “What Phase 1 must do” and “Contract check”, it explicitly states: “Supporting issue policy must be `context_only_no_defect_analysis`.” and that Phase 1 `--post` validates “support relation map, support summaries, and non-defect routing (support issues must not trigger defect analysis).” This directly covers the case focus at the contract level.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly frames the evaluation as Phase 1 only: “Verdict: PASS (phase1 contract satisfied)” and “This benchmark deliverable is limited to Phase 1 contract verification… No Phase 2+ artifacts are generated/reviewed here.” The execution_notes.md also notes lack of runtime outputs and that it can only validate “phase1 contract coverage.”
